name: hapray
description: Code-oriented Performance Analysis for OpenHarmony Apps

scripts.build: npm run prebuild && npm run build --ws
scripts.build:quick: npm run prebuild && npm run build --workspace web --workspace tools/static_analyzer --workspace perf_testing
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces --if-present && find . \( -name node_modules -o -name .git \) -prune -o -type d -name .venv -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf dist out && rm -f ArkAnalyzer-HapRay-*.zip opt-detector-*.zip
